itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler settings with the unified release flag for Java 9+ module system compatibility.
itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in Java 9+ and ignored when 'release' is present; using 'release' ensures the bytecode is compatible with the target JDK and prevents compilation warnings or errors in newer Maven Compiler Plugin versions.

itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Update JAXB dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to align with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not available in Java 21; the coveralls-maven-plugin likely requires the Jakarta namespace version to function correctly or avoid classpath conflicts in a Jakarta EE environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 21 or lack support for the 'release' flag behavior required for modern JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from source/target to release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 21 can lead to mismatched bootstrap classpaths and runtime errors; the 'release' flag ensures correct compilation for the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to a version that supports Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or generate incorrect bytecode on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions cannot instrument or analyze classes compiled for Java 21, causing build failures during test coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 21 (and Spring Boot 3.x) uses the Jakarta EE namespace; javax.xml.bind is no longer available or supported, leading to compile/runtime errors if not migrated.
